shot_list.shot: campus exterior or laptop opening shot
shot_list.fallback: self-made title card with typing animation

shot_list.shot: department name title over campus or classroom background
hands typing code, notes, or classroom study shot
fast cuts of AI/data/system/network/multimedia keywords and self-made screen visuals
shot_list.fallback: CapCut text labels over self-filmed laptop footage

shot_list.shot: demo screen, simple app, web page, or terminal output
group discussion, whiteboard, peer review, debugging
shot_list.fallback: hands-only discussion shot or whiteboard without faces

shot_list.shot: project demonstration or real-life use scenario
campus learning atmosphere, hallway, classroom, walking shot
shot_list.fallback: campus scenery with no identifiable faces

shot_list.shot: student back view, laptop closing, or clean title background

shot_list.fallback: plain black or white background with text

visual_constraints: avoid unofficial logo use unless permission is clear
use self-made or clearly licensed assets
